headline: Ecolab Closes CoolIT Acquisition, Strengthens AI Cooling Portfolio
summary: ECL's $4.75B CoolIT acquisition boosts its AI cooling portfolio and positions High-Tech as a major long-term growth engine.

raw.headline: Ecolab Closes CoolIT Acquisition, Strengthens AI Cooling Portfolio

headline: What to Expect From Ecolab's Q2 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Ecolab is set to announce its second-quarter earnings in July, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by double digits.
